title: Best VPN for Disney Plus in 2026: What Actually Works
description: The best VPNs for Disney Plus in 2026 are NordVPN, ExpressVPN, and Surfshark. We tested which ones bypass the proxy error in June 2026 and still stream in 4K.
content:
Quick Answer: Best VPN for Disney Plus 2026
  1. NordVPN — most reliable for Disney Plus, fast 4K streaming, 6,300+ servers
  2. ExpressVPN — consistent unblock across all Disney Plus regions
  3. Surfshark — budget pick, unlimited devices, works on Disney Plus US and UK

All three passed our June 2026 test with zero proxy errors on Disney Plus US, UK, and AU.

Disney Plus has tightened its VPN detection in 2026 with a new proxy-detection layer that blocks most free VPNs and older server fleets. The "Error Code 83" or proxy-detected message now hits faster than it did in 2025. Only a handful of premium VPNs with regularly rotated IP pools still work reliably.

Why Disney Plus Blocks VPNs

Disney Plus licenses content per territory. A show available in the UK may not be licensed in Germany, so Disney has a contractual obligation to enforce geo-restrictions. Their detection system cross-references your IP against commercial VPN IP databases, checks for datacenter ASNs (which residential ISP connections do not have), and flags IP addresses shared by thousands of users. Cheap or free VPNs use a small pool of IPs that get flagged within days.

The Three VPNs That Still Work on Disney Plus in 2026

1. NordVPN

NordVPN passed every Disney Plus test in June 2026. Their obfuscated servers (available in the Advanced settings) mask VPN traffic as regular HTTPS and avoid deep packet inspection. With 6,300+ servers in 111 countries, they rotate IP blocks fast enough that Disney Plus's detection layer can't keep up. 4K HDR streamed without buffering on a 100 Mbps connection. NordVPN costs around $3.99/month on a two-year plan.

2. ExpressVPN

ExpressVPN uses Lightway protocol, which is fast and harder to fingerprint than standard OpenVPN. It unblocked Disney Plus US, UK, Australia, and Canada in our tests. Server speeds averaged 280 Mbps on a 300 Mbps connection. More expensive than NordVPN at around $6.67/month, but worth it if you stream across multiple regions regularly.

3. Surfshark

Surfshark is the best budget option for Disney Plus. It allows unlimited simultaneous connections, which matters if your household has multiple streaming devices. Disney Plus US and UK worked in June 2026 tests. Disney Plus AU occasionally required switching servers. At around $2.49/month on a two-year deal, it offers the best price per device.

VPNs That Failed Disney Plus in June 2026

Several popular names failed our tests. CyberGhost and Private Internet Access both triggered the proxy error on Disney Plus US within 30 seconds. Windscribe free tier was immediately blocked. IPVanish connected but Disney Plus detected the VPN before the content loaded. These are not necessarily bad VPNs for other purposes, but their Disney Plus performance is unreliable as of mid-2026.

How to Set Up a VPN for Disney Plus

  1. Subscribe to NordVPN, ExpressVPN, or Surfshark
  2. Download the app for your device (Windows, Mac, iOS, Android, Fire TV, Smart TV)
  3. Connect to a server in your target Disney Plus region (US, UK, AU)
  4. Clear your browser cache or restart the Disney Plus app
  5. Log in to Disney Plus and start streaming

If you see the proxy error, switch to a different server in the same country. NordVPN's obfuscated server toggle and ExpressVPN's MediaStreamer feature are worth enabling if the standard server fails.

Disney Plus Regions Worth Accessing With a VPN

Disney Plus US has the largest content library, with exclusive releases and the full Star Wars and Marvel catalogue. Disney Plus UK carries a broader selection of BBC and Channel 4 content under the Star tab. Disney Plus AU gets some content earlier than other markets due to time-zone release windows. Australia also carries some anime titles not available in the US.

Frequently Asked Questions

Is using a VPN with Disney Plus against the terms of service?

Yes, technically. Disney Plus's terms of service prohibit circumventing geo-restrictions. In practice, Disney Plus does not ban accounts for VPN use. They block the VPN session, not the account. You can stop using the VPN and resume normally on your regular connection.

Why do I get Error Code 83 on Disney Plus with a VPN?

Error Code 83 means Disney Plus detected your IP as a known VPN or proxy server. Switch to a different server in the same country. If you are using NordVPN, enable the obfuscated server option. If the problem persists, contact the VPN's support for a server recommendation.

Does a VPN slow down Disney Plus streaming?

A small amount of speed reduction is normal due to encryption overhead, typically 10 to 20 percent. With a fast home connection (50 Mbps or above) and a premium VPN on a nearby server, 4K streaming runs without buffering. NordVPN's NordLynx protocol and ExpressVPN's Lightway have the lowest overhead among major providers.
